response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptional engineer with over 15 years of experience, perfectly matching the technical requirements including TypeScript, React, AWS, and LLM integration. However, the role is explicitly defined as an entry-level Junior/Mid position. As a current Staff Software Engineer and Founder, Bogdan is massively overqualified, which introduces severe risks regarding compensation alignment, job satisfaction, and retention for a junior-level individual contributor role.
strengths: Perfect technical alignment with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and REST API architecture.
Deep experience with all nice-to-have skills, including AWS, Kubernetes, and LLM/AI integrations.
Proven track record of software craftsmanship, clean architecture, and TDD.
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level junior/mid position.
Compensation expectations will almost certainly far exceed the budget for an entry-level role.
High flight risk or potential job dissatisfaction due to the limited scope of junior-level responsibilities.
